routines.name: Nightly Research
routines.description: Overnight autonomous research sweep across all CRG silos. Dispatches parallel subagents, writes per-silo briefings, hands off to Ezra by 5:00am ET.
routines.status_detail: Scheduled task registered 2026-04-22. First run tonight at 11:07pm ET.

routines.name: Morning Brief
routines.description: Synthesizes overnight research output into Marc's daily brief. Ships via Resend to marc@cornerstoneregroup.ca. Posts to Garvis Morning Brief tile.
routines.status_detail: Skill spec exists at skills/crg/morning-brief-builder.md. Scheduled task not yet registered — needs separate registration.

routines.name: Samuel Weekly Digest
routines.description: Monday 6:00 AM UTC weekly evaluation. Scores every named agent against doctrine, proposes prompt-tuning PRs, writes digest to /data/samuel-digest.json for Garvis Agent Bus tile.
routines.cron_human: Every Monday at 6:00 AM UTC (2:00 AM ET)
routines.status_detail: Data stub exists at crg-command-center/data/samuel-digest.json (null state). Garvis Samuel Digest tile is wired. Scheduled task not yet registered.
routines.note: Inner loop only per doctrine_self_learning_loops.md — outer loop (firm, quarterly) deferred to Q3 2026

routines.name: Vault Keeper Health Check
routines.description: Every 6 hours: checks all API keys / OAuth tokens via health-ping, refreshes expiring OAuth tokens via Doppler, syncs Doppler→Netlify env vars, writes /health/secrets.json for Garvis footer indicator.
routines.status_detail: Architecture specced in skill_secrets_rotation.md. Doppler + Netlify scheduled function not yet built. Garvis footer Vault Keeper indicator is wired to /health/secrets.json (stub). Marc action required: sign up for Doppler free tier.
routines.marc_action_required: Sign up for Doppler free tier + run doppler secrets import from TOOLS.md. Then Levite function can be built.
